status_legend.in_progress: This is the current active task. Only one feature may be in this state.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.needs_verification: Work is implemented or documented but lacks sufficient verification evidence.
status_legend.passing: Required verification passed and evidence is recorded.
status_legend.superseded: The item was replaced by another documented decision or feature.

features.title: Initialize agent-readable harness
features.user_visible_behavior: A new agent session can understand the starter purpose, current unknowns, and validation command without external context.
acceptance_criteria: README.md explains that the repository is product-neutral and stack-neutral
AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md define startup order and working rules
ARCHITECTURE.md records that product, stack, and repository shape are TBD
init.sh validates the baseline document set
verification: Verify README.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, feature_list.json, and claude-progress.md are present and non-empty
evidence: 2026-05-20: Starter repository reset to generic harness engineering baseline.
features.notes: This is a cloneable baseline, not an application scaffold.

features.title: Track work with feature_list and progress notes
features.user_visible_behavior: Work state is visible to humans and machine-readable agents.
acceptance_criteria: feature_list.json contains status, verification, and evidence fields
feature_list.json records state transition rules
claude-progress.md summarizes current state and next actions
docs/session-handoff.md provides a handoff format for later sessions
verification: Verify every feature has non-empty verification steps
evidence: 2026-05-20: feature_list.json updated with rules, status legend, verification, and evidence fields.
features.notes: Project-specific features should replace or extend this list after cloning.

features.title: Define global and scoped agent/design document hierarchy
features.user_visible_behavior: A cloned project can use root-level and path-specific AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and DESIGN.md files without ambiguity.
acceptance_criteria: docs/INSTRUCTION_HIERARCHY.md defines global and scoped file resolution
AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md require reading applicable scoped documents
docs/FRONTEND.md states that GUI work requires DESIGN.md
Scoped DESIGN.md files are allowed to extend the global design baseline
verification: Verify docs/INSTRUCTION_HIERARCHY.md is present and referenced from README.md, AGENTS.md, and CLAUDE.md
Verify docs/FRONTEND.md documents global and scoped DESIGN.md behavior
evidence: 2026-05-20: Updated README.md, AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, DESIGN.md, and docs/FRONTEND.md with scoped document rules.
features.notes: This supports single-project and multi-scope repositories without preselecting a repository structure.

features.title: Define project foundation
features.user_visible_behavior: A reader can state what the project is, who it serves, what problem it solves, and what is explicitly out of scope.
acceptance_criteria: docs/product-specs/project-foundation.md has a concrete problem statement
Primary user group and first use case are defined
Initial success metric is defined
Non-goals are explicit
verification: Confirm the project can be summarized in one sentence
Confirm the first user and first observable success are explicit
features.notes: This should be the first project-specific update after cloning.

features.title: Provide observability template for agent and runtime signals
features.user_visible_behavior: A cloned project has a place to record runtime signals, task traces, failure layers, and GUI evidence expectations.
acceptance_criteria: docs/OBSERVABILITY.md defines runtime and process observability layers
docs/OBSERVABILITY.md provides a task trace template
docs/RELIABILITY.md references observability evidence
README.md lists docs/OBSERVABILITY.md in the repository map
verification: Verify README.md and docs/RELIABILITY.md reference observability
evidence: 2026-05-20: Linked observability from README.md, docs/HARNESS.md, docs/RELIABILITY.md, and init.sh.
features.notes: This is intentionally tool-neutral until the first runtime is selected.

features.title: Choose initial technical stack
features.user_visible_behavior: The repository has a justified first stack and matching validation commands.
acceptance_criteria: Stack decision is recorded in docs/design-docs/
README.md and ARCHITECTURE.md reflect the selected stack
init.sh or a linked validation script runs the first real checks
Rollback or migration path is documented
verification: Review the stack decision document in docs/design-docs/
features.notes: Do not select a stack before the first product surface and success criteria are known.

features.title: Create first executable skeleton
features.user_visible_behavior: The project can be run locally with the selected stack.
acceptance_criteria: A minimal executable application or service exists
Local run command is documented
Basic smoke test or health check exists
No placeholder product claims remain hidden in code
verification: Run the documented local start command
Run the documented smoke test or health check
features.notes: The starter intentionally does not contain an app scaffold.
